subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: If we become adorned with these attributes of the All-Merciful, ere long shall the ultimate purpose, which is none other than unity, be attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر باین صفات رحمانی متصف شویم عنقریب مقصد کلی که عبارت از اتحاد
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @unity; oneness of humanity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prophecy and fulfillment
